briefing.tech_stocks: AI sector shows strong performance, led by Seagate (+353%) and Micron (+326%), despite analyst caution regarding high valuations and potential bubble concerns.
briefing.art_market: Global art market rebounded in 2025/2026, with sales reaching $59.6 billion (up 4%), driven by strong auction performance in the U.S.
briefing.apple: Apple introduced 'Apple Business', an all-in-one platform for business scalability, and launched the AirPods Max 2.
briefing.ai_innovation: Georgia Tech researchers developed 'POLYT5', an AI-driven tool for generative polymer design, advancing materials science.
briefing.market_sentiment: Investor focus remains on proof of AI returns; caution persists amid geopolitical uncertainty, but long-term demand for AI infrastructure is robust.
